== Notes for [[Item:Q84750|Q84750]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3144B1CF71EFBC189822EF79916CCDCD
geni:6000000021371962557

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
